company.name: ABZ Innovation
company.description: ABZ Innovation develops and manufactures heavy duty action drones designed to optimize workflows in different sectors. Products are built with European R&D and manufacturing standards.

product_series.name: L-Series
product_series.description: Agricultural drones featuring CDA spraying systems and optimized downward airflow for highly efficient and precise spraying. Reduces water use up to 90%, chemicals by up to 50%, and operating costs up to 75%.

product_series.name: S-Series
product_series.tagline: Spreading Granules or Seeds Made Simple
product_series.description: Drones designed for efficient seed and fertilizer distribution across various agricultural applications.

product_series.name: M-Series
product_series.description: Robust, customizable drone platforms ideal for R&D, universities, and custom developments. Equipped with power and communication ports for integrating sensors, cameras, or delivery systems.

product_series.name: C-Series
product_series.description: Cutting-edge drones for cleaning hard-to-reach areas in industrial buildings, factories, and office complexes. Eliminates the need for cranes or scaffolding.

drones.name: L50
drones.subtitle: Europe's Most Efficient High-Performance Field Spraying Drone
drones.ideal_for: Large farms over 300 ha and service providers

drones.name: L30 V2
drones.subtitle: The Perfect Balance Between Speed, Cost, and Logistics
drones.ideal_for: Medium to larger farms, orchards, vineyards, cereals, greenhouse shading

specs.obstacle_detection: ABZ Sense (LiDAR-based obstacle avoidance and terrain follow)
specs.transport: Fits in a standard pick-up truck

drones.name: L10 V2
drones.subtitle: Industry-Leading Low Operating Costs
drones.ideal_for: Farmers with up to ~150 hectares, training, service providers with smaller farms

specs.terrain_follow: Smart terrain follow in vineyards and orchards

drones.name: S50
drones.subtitle: High-Precision Seeding and Fertilization
drones.ideal_for: Large-scale operations, targeted fertilization, seeding, fish farm feeding

specs.obstacle_detection: ABZ Sense (LiDAR-based obstacle avoidance and terrain follow)

drones.name: S20
drones.subtitle: Precision Spreading for Small to Medium Operations

drones.name: M40
drones.subtitle: Heavy-Lift Multifunctional Platform
drones.ideal_for: R&D companies and universities for custom drone developments, training, and experimentation

drones.name: M12
drones.subtitle: Compact and Versatile Multifunctional Platform
drones.ideal_for: R&D, universities, custom development, training. C4 labeled for EU drone regulations.

drones.name: C10
drones.subtitle: Industrial High-Pressure Cleaning Drone
drones.ideal_for: Industrial buildings, factories, office complexes, hard-to-reach areas

accessories.name: 70 L Spreader System
accessories.description: High-capacity intelligent spreading system for seed and fertilizer distribution. Features precision dosing mechanism and integrated sensors.

accessories.name: 50 L Spreader System
accessories.description: Compatible with seeds and granules 0.5-6 mm. Ideal for seeding, deicing agents, or fertilizing.

accessories.name: Granule Spreader (L10)
accessories.description: Add granule spreading capability to the L10 V2.

accessories.name: Trichogramma Spreading System
accessories.description: Chemical-free biological pest control using Trichogramma brassicae to combat European Corn Borer. 8-liter tank, treats up to 36 hectares/hour, holds 800-1200 pellets.

accessories.name: Flight Termination System
accessories.description: Enhances operational safety. Pilot can shut down motors independently of the drone's flight controller.

accessories.name: Emlid RS3 RTK Base Station
accessories.description: Multi-band, multi-constellation GNSS with up to 60° tilt compensation and ultra-fast RTK initialization. IP67 and MIL-STD-810H rated, 18-hour battery.

accessories.name: Night Kit
accessories.description: Enables night/early morning operations when temperatures are lower and humidity higher, improving absorption and reducing drift.

accessories.name: ABZ Prop Guard
accessories.description: Carbon fiber, aluminum alloy, and ABS plastic propeller guard. 910g per pair, quick-release design. Recommended for close-range operations.

accessories.name: Kärcher High Pressure Cleaning System
accessories.description: Ground-based high pressure cleaning unit that connects to the C10 drone via hose.

accessories.name: Hose 30 m
accessories.description: 6 mm ID / 12 mm OD, rated for up to 200 bar, burst > 800 bar. Chemical and weather resistant.

accessories.name: Hose 60 m
accessories.description: 6 mm ID / 12 mm OD, rated for up to 200 bar, burst > 800 bar. Chemical and weather resistant. For higher reach operations.

use_cases.name: Crop Spraying (Arable Fields)
use_cases.description: Spraying herbicides, fungicides, or insecticides on open-field crops like wheat, corn, sunflower, and soy.
use_cases.considerations: Choose based on farm size: L10 V2 for up to ~150 ha, L30 V2 for medium-large, L50 for 300+ ha.

use_cases.name: Orchard Spraying
use_cases.description: Spraying fruit trees with terrain-following capability for uneven terrain.
use_cases.considerations: Terrain follow is essential. L10 V2 offers narrow 1.5 m working width for tight rows.

use_cases.name: Vineyard Spraying
use_cases.description: Precision spraying for vineyards with narrow row spacing.
use_cases.considerations: L10 V2's 1.5 m minimum working width is ideal for narrow vineyard rows.

use_cases.name: Greenhouse Shading
use_cases.description: Applying shading paint to greenhouse roofs. Covers 2 ha/hour, 70% faster than manual methods.
use_cases.considerations: Operates at 2.5-4 m above greenhouse. Uses 333 L water/ha and 100 L paint/ha.

use_cases.name: Seeding
use_cases.description: Distributing seeds across fields for planting.
use_cases.considerations: S50 for large-scale (1100 kg/h), S20 for smaller operations (440 kg/h). L-series with optional spreader also available.

use_cases.name: Fertilization (Granular)
use_cases.considerations: Can also be done with L30 V2 + 50L spreader or L50 + 70L spreader for combined spray+spread operations.

use_cases.name: Biological Pest Control (Trichogramma)
use_cases.description: Deploying Trichogramma brassicae parasitic wasps against European Corn Borer. Chemical-free.
use_cases.considerations: Requires Trichogramma Spreading System accessory. Treats up to 36 ha/hour.

use_cases.name: Industrial & Building Cleaning
use_cases.description: High-pressure cleaning of facades, factory interiors, and hard-to-reach surfaces.
use_cases.considerations: Up to 60 m height. Eliminates cranes and scaffolding. Radar-based distance control.

use_cases.name: Research & Development
use_cases.description: Custom drone development, sensor integration, payload testing, academic research.
use_cases.considerations: M12 for up to 12 kg payload (C4 labeled), M40 for up to 40 kg. Both have open-source software and full communication ports.

use_cases.name: Package Delivery
use_cases.description: Transporting packages or supplies via drone.
use_cases.considerations: M40 handles heavy payloads up to 40 kg. M12 for lighter deliveries up to 12 kg.

cda_spraying.name: CDA (Controlled Droplet Application)
cda_spraying.description: Unlike hydraulic spraying which creates uneven droplet sizes (causing ~50% waste), CDA ensures precise droplet sizes tailored to specific crop needs. Combined with drone propeller downwash for even distribution.
benefits: Can spray after rain when tractors cannot access fields
